query:
ALTER TABLE final_recipes 
ADD COLUMN isSemiFinished BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN isSellable BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
ADD COLUMN sellingPrice DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT NULL;
